_meta.notes: Synthesized TaskUpdate PostToolUse stdin shape representing a metadata-only TaskUpdate (e.g. teachback_submit, intentional_wait, handoff, progress, memory_saved). tool_input carries taskId + metadata fields but NO status field. Pins the negative-case trigger semantics for the teammate-Arm pre-branch: the predicate ladder's transition clause must reject this shape (no pending->in_progress status transition) and write NO inbox marker. Counterpart positive fixture: teammate_claim_in_progress_shape.json.
